'''√j-ng-sh''' ('''jangasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zippo|zippo]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zippo|zippo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √j-ng-sh
|-
! Lemma
| jangasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jangashithi|jangashithi]] || [[word:jangashiji|jangashiji]] || [[word:jangashishi|jangashishi]] || [[word:jangashi|jangashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangashuthuth|jangashuthuth]] || [[word:jangashujuj|jangashujuj]] || [[word:jangashushush|jangashushush]] || [[word:jangash|jangash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangashuthu|jangashuthu]] || [[word:jangashuju|jangashuju]] || [[word:jangashushu|jangashushu]] || [[word:jangashu|jangashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangashufuth|jangashufuth]] || [[word:jangashufuj|jangashufuj]] || [[word:jangashufush|jangashufush]] || [[word:jangashuf|jangashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jangashethe|jangashethe]] || [[word:jangasheje|jangasheje]] || [[word:jangasheshe|jangasheshe]] || [[word:jangashe|jangashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangashothoth|jangashothoth]] || [[word:jangashojoj|jangashojoj]] || [[word:jangashoshosh|jangashoshosh]] || [[word:jangash|jangash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangashotho|jangashotho]] || [[word:jangashojo|jangashojo]] || [[word:jangashosho|jangashosho]] || [[word:jangasho|jangasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangashofoth|jangashofoth]] || [[word:jangashofoj|jangashofoj]] || [[word:jangashofosh|jangashofosh]] || [[word:jangashof|jangashof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangashïfïf|jangashïfïf]] || [[word:jangashïfïf|jangashïfïf]] || [[word:jangashïfïf|jangashïfïf]] || [[word:jangashïfïf|jangashïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]] || [[word:jangashïf|jangashïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jangashæthæ|jangashæthæ]] || [[word:jangashæjæ|jangashæjæ]] || [[word:jangashæshæ|jangashæshæ]] || [[word:jangashæ|jangashæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jangashathath|jangashathath]] || [[word:jangashajaj|jangashajaj]] || [[word:jangashashash|jangashashash]] || [[word:jangash|jangash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jangashatha|jangashatha]] || [[word:jangashaja|jangashaja]] || [[word:jangashasha|jangashasha]] || [[word:jangasha|jangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jangashafath|jangashafath]] || [[word:jangashafaj|jangashafaj]] || [[word:jangashafash|jangashafash]] || [[word:jangashaf|jangashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:jangashasha|jangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gojangashasha|gojangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokijangashasha|gokijangashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:jangashnüsha|jangashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gojangashnknüsha|gojangashnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokijangashnüsha|gokijangashnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jangashshësha|jangashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojangashnkshësha|gojangashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijangashshësha|gokijangashshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jangashrosha|jangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojangashnkrosha|gojangashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijangashrosha|gokijangashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jangashmusha|jangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangashnkmusha|gojangashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangashmusha|gokijangashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:jangashsherasha|jangashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gojangashnksherasha|gojangashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokijangashsherasha|gokijangashsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:jangashngasha|jangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gojangashnkngasha|gojangashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokijangashngasha|gokijangashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jangashyasha|jangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gojangashnkyasha|gojangashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokijangashyasha|gokijangashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:jangashyamasha|jangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gojangashnkyamasha|gojangashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokijangashyamasha|gokijangashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:jangashnüshësha|jangashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojangashnknüshësha|gojangashnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijangashnüshësha|gokijangashnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jangashnürosha|jangashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojangashnknürosha|gojangashnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijangashnürosha|gokijangashnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangashnümusha|jangashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangashnknümusha|gojangashnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangashnümusha|gokijangashnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:jangashshënüsha|jangashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojangashnkshënüsha|gojangashnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijangashshënüsha|gokijangashshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jangashshërosha|jangashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojangashnkshërosha|gojangashnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijangashshërosha|gokijangashshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangashshëmusha|jangashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangashnkshëmusha|gojangashnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangashshëmusha|gokijangashshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:jangashronüsha|jangashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojangashnkronüsha|gojangashnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijangashronüsha|gokijangashronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:jangashroshësha|jangashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojangashnkroshësha|gojangashnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijangashroshësha|gokijangashroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jangashromusha|jangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojangashnkromusha|gojangashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijangashromusha|gokijangashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:jangashmunüsha|jangashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gojangashnkmunüsha|gojangashnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokijangashmunüsha|gokijangashmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:jangashmushësha|jangashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gojangashnkmushësha|gojangashnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokijangashmushësha|gokijangashmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:jangashmurosha|jangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojangashnkmurosha|gojangashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokijangashmurosha|gokijangashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:jangash|jangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:jængæsh|jængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hojangash|hojangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hojængæsh|hojængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojangash|hohojangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohojængæsh|hohojængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüjangash|nüjangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüjængæsh|nüjængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjangash|nünüjangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüjængæsh|nünüjængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïjangash|nïjangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïjængæsh|nïjængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjangash|nïnïjangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïjængæsh|nïnïjængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lujangash|lujangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lujængæsh|lujængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujangash|lulujangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulujængæsh|lulujængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lijangash|lijangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lijængæsh|lijængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijangash|lilijangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilijængæsh|lilijængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kojangash|kojangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kojængæsh|kojængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojangash|kokojangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokojængæsh|kokojængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kejangash|kejangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kejængæsh|kejængæsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejangash|kekejangash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekejængæsh|kekejængæsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
